summary: Shadow Staff Feature - All tests pass. Backend: 14/14 API tests pass. Frontend: Shadow display, Add Shadow form, shadow persistence all working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Shadow feature is fully functional and well-implemented
Shadow inherits bus_number and session from linked camper correctly
Shadows are counted in seat availability calculations (both AM and PM)
Duplicate shadow creation is properly rejected (400 error)
Shadow UI in InfoWindow uses purple background for visual distinction
data-testid attributes present for testing: add-shadow-btn, shadow-name-input
seed_data_creation: One shadow already exists: 'John Smith (Shadow)' linked to Shane Siegel on Bus #14
context_for_next_testing_agent: Shadow Staff feature is complete and working. Backend tests in /app/tests/test_shadow_api.py cover all CRUD operations and seat availability integration. Existing shadow: 'John Smith (Shadow)' linked to Shane Siegel (Siegel_Shane_11561) on Bus #14. Frontend shadow UI appears in camper InfoWindow popup - shows 'Add Shadow' button for campers without shadow, shows shadow name with X delete button for campers with shadow.

features_tested.shadow_api_get_all: PASS - GET /api/shadows returns all shadows with correct data structure
features_tested.shadow_api_get_by_camper: PASS - GET /api/shadows/by-camper/{camper_id} returns shadow for specific camper
features_tested.shadow_api_get_by_bus: PASS - GET /api/shadows/by-bus/{bus_number} returns shadows on specific bus
features_tested.shadow_api_create: PASS - POST /api/shadows creates shadow linked to camper, inherits bus and session
features_tested.shadow_api_duplicate_rejected: PASS - Creating duplicate shadow for same camper returns 400 error
features_tested.shadow_api_invalid_camper: PASS - Creating shadow with invalid camper_id returns 404 error
features_tested.shadow_seat_availability: PASS - GET /api/seat-availability-json includes shadow counts in bus data
features_tested.shadow_inherits_bus: PASS - Shadow bus_number matches linked camper's AM bus
features_tested.shadow_inherits_session: PASS - Shadow session matches linked camper's session
features_tested.frontend_shadow_display: PASS - Existing shadow shows in purple background with name and X delete button
features_tested.frontend_add_shadow_button: PASS - 'Add Shadow' button appears for campers without shadow
features_tested.frontend_shadow_form: PASS - Clicking 'Add Shadow' shows input field with Save/Cancel buttons
features_tested.frontend_shadow_persistence: PASS - Shadow persists after page reload
